summary: DevX/bootstrap regression testing. Ran bash /app/scripts/bootstrap.sh from a fully clean state (removed frontend/node_modules, packages/motive-icons/node_modules, dist, and all tarballs). Script completed with exit 0. All required artefacts produced. Frontend restarted via supervisor, compiled successfully. All 4 preview URLs return 200 with correct DOM content. Consumer install into scratch /tmp project produced working CJS bundle with exactly 35 exports (33 icons + IconShell + useIconTrigger).
critical_code_review_comments: bootstrap.sh runs `yarn build` explicitly and then `npm pack` which triggers prepack -> yarn build again (build runs twice, ~1s wasted). Non-blocking but could drop step [2/5] since prepack handles it.

frontend/.env.example points REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to http://localhost:8001 but the actual /app/frontend/.env in this environment overrides to the preview URL, so that's fine for local dev but new users following README locally will need a running backend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bootstrap flow is fully green. If revisiting, re-run: rm -rf /app/frontend/node_modules /app/packages/motive-icons/node_modules /app/packages/motive-icons/dist /app/packages/motive-icons/motive-icons-*.tgz /app/frontend/public/motive-icons-*.tgz && bash /app/scripts/bootstrap.sh. Consumer smoke: node -e in /tmp/motive-consumer-check should print 'OK 35'.
